package_name: 五参数控制台贴合式展开与交互修正

parameter_entry_visual: removed prominent outer stroke and grid-like borders
kept lightweight active highlight with accent text, subtle fill, underline and glow
kept non-active items transparent and readable
inline_ruler: kept parameter row fixed during active changes
added active anchor under the selected parameter
changed ruler insertion to top-down move plus opacity
kept value badge, center pointer, major/minor ticks and AUTO/RESET/LOCK controls
outside_dismiss: top status tap dismisses inline controls
intent switcher tap dismisses inline controls
parameter taps switch or collapse without triggering runtime writes

tint_fix.root_cause: TINT UI ticks used values finer than the runtime 5-step tint quantization, causing values like +/-2 to be rounded back by runtime and appear unadjustable.
tint_fix.fix: Aligned tintWheelValues to runtime-confirmable 5-step ticks and quantized the appended runtime value to the same step.
tint_fix.tint_reset_contract: RESET only; does not call applyWhiteBalanceAuto.

haptics.tick_change_feedback: light feedback only when a real tick change is applied

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -project /Users/sungning/Projects/SellerCamera/SellerCamera.xcodeproj -scheme SellerCamera -configuration Debug -destination "generic/platform=iOS Simulator" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

device_run.reason: No device execution was performed in this package.

known_risks: TINT visual color direction still requires real-device color validation.
Some lower empty-area outside-dismiss cases may need a future transparent hit layer if found on device.
R49 numbering overlaps with the independent Focus preflight report; this package uses a separate filename and does not overwrite it.
